nasb.text: And the Lord said, “The outcry of Sodom and Gomorrah is indeed great, and their sin is exceedingly grave.

esv.text: Then the Lord said, “Because the outcry against Sodom and Gomorrah is great and their sin is very grave,

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“控告所多瑪和蛾摩拉的聲音甚大，他們的罪惡極重。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“所多玛和蛾摩拉罪恶深重，人们怨声载道。

csbs.text: 然后耶和华说：“控告所多玛和格摩拉的呼声非常大，他们的罪恶极其深重；
